name: salesforce-flow-analyzer-mcp
description: MCP Server for Salesforce Flow Analysis, Testing, and Regression Detection

tools.name: analyze_flow
tools.description: Analyze a Salesforce Flow and get comprehensive insights

tools.name: list_flows
tools.description: List all Salesforce Flows available in the workspace

tools.name: query_flow
tools.description: Ask an AI-powered natural language question about a Salesforce Flow

tools.name: create_scenarios
tools.description: Generate test scenarios from flow decisions, conditions, and logic

tools.name: run_scenarios
tools.description: Execute AI-powered test scenarios against flows

tools.name: list_scenario_categories
tools.description: List all available test scenario categories

tools.name: create_baseline
tools.description: Create a new baseline snapshot from current flow metadata

tools.name: get_active_baseline
tools.description: Get information about the currently active baseline

tools.name: run_regression
tools.description: Compare current flows against baseline and detect changes

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate an HTML report from the latest test results

tools.name: get_flow_dependencies
tools.description: Get all dependencies for a flow

tools.name: check_best_practices
tools.description: Check a flow against Salesforce best practices

author: Flow AI Implementation
